samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
	<description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU</description>
	<ports>
		<input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand</input>
		<input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand</input>
		<input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation to be performed</input>
		<output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation</output>
		<output id="zero" width_description="[0:0]">Indicates whether the result is zero</output>
		<output id="carry" width_description="[0:0]">Indicates whether a carry occurred during the operation</output>
		<output id="negative" width_description="[0:0]">Indicates whether the result is negative</output>
		<output id="overflow" width_description="[0:0]">Indicates whether an overflow occurred during the operation</output>
		<output id="flag" width_description="[0:0]">General flag, set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU)</output>
	endports
	
	<parameter_description>
		ADD = 6'b100000;
		ADDU = 6'b100001;
		SUB = 6'b100010;
		SUBU = 6'b100011;
		AND = 6'b100100;
		OR = 6'b100101;
		XOR = 6'b100110;
		NOR = 6'b100111;
		SLT = 6'b101010;
		SLTU = 6'b101011;
		SLL = 6'b000000;
		SRL = 6'b000010;
		SRA = 6'b000011;
		SLLV = 6'b000100;
		SRLV = 6'b000110;
		SRAV = 6'b000111;
		LUI = 6'b001111;
	endparameter_description
	
	<logic_description type="sequential_logic">
	
		reg [31:0] res;
		
		wire signed [31:0] a_signed;
		wire signed [31:0] b_signed;
		
		assign a_signed=a;
		assign b_signed=b;
		
		assign r=res[31:0];
		assign flag=(aluc==SLT || aluc==SLTU)?1'b1:'bz;
		
		always@(*) begin
			
			case(aluc)
				ADD: res <= a+b;
				ADDU: res <= a+b;
				SUB: res <= a-b;
				SUBU: res <= a-b;
				AND: res <= a&b;
				OR: res <= a|b;
				XOR: res <= a^b;
				NOR: res <= ~(a|b);
				SLT: res <= ($signed(a)<$signed(b)) ? 1 : 0;
				SLTU: res <= ((a<b)&&(a>=0 && b >= 0))? 1:0 ;
				SLL: res <= $unsigned($unsigned(b)<<a[4:0]);
				SRL: res <= $unsigned($unsigned(b)>>a[4:0]);
				SRA: res <= $unsigned($signed(b_signed)>>(a[4:0]));
				SLLV: res <= $unsigned(b<<a[4:0]);
				SRLV: res <= $unsigned(b>>a[4:0]);
				SRAV: res <= $unsigned(b_signed>>>a[4:0]);
				LUI: res <= {a[15:0],16'd0};
				
				default: res <= 32'dz;
			endcase
		
			
		end
	
		assign zero = (&(res)) ? 1'b0 : 1'b1;
		assign carry = (res > 32'hffffffff) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
		assign negative = res[31];
		assign overflow = (res > 32'hffffffff || res < 0 )? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
		
	
	
	endlogic_description
	
endmodule
samples.sc_log:
TopModule.sv:131: error: flag Unable to assign to unresolved wires.
1 error(s) during elaboration.
